# Local web fonts

The landing page self-hosts the following fonts:

- Inter Tight — SIL Open Font License 1.1: https://github.com/googlefonts/inter-gf
- Manrope — SIL Open Font License 1.1: https://github.com/sharanda/manrope
- JetBrains Mono — SIL Open Font License 1.1: https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono

The WOFF2 files in this directory are redistributed under their respective SIL Open Font License 1.1 terms.
